Their focused stance conveys a sense of speed, appearing silhouetted against the bright sunlight, while the background is blurred by the rapid movement. The background is a calm and saturated afternoon hue.
The camera angle is low and slightly tilted, giving the motorcycle a dynamic look in the frame. Without warning, the rider and the motorcycle suddenly burst apart into a myriad of bright red petals. Their entities instantly drift backwards and disappear, and the entire structure instantly disintegrates, leaving only countless floating petals that slowly dissipate in the sunlight.
The roads, shadows and lights of the suburb must remain completely unchanged throughout the effect. The bright red petals should float slowly and not glow or reflect. Make sure that the simultaneous dissolution looks smooth and grand in scale, with no distortion in the background.
